title: Mini Splits Installation
desc: We provide professional mini split installation services for efficient heating and cooling in residential and commercial spaces. Our team installs ductless systems with precision, ensuring proper sizing, placement, and setup for optimal performance. We handle full installation, electrical connections, and system testing to deliver quiet, energy-efficient climate control tailored to individual rooms or zones for year-round comfort and reliability.

## Types of Heat Pumps We Install

## Ducted Air-Source Heat Pumps

Our ducted air-source heat pumps use your home’s existing ductwork to deliver efficient heating and cooling throughout every room. Enjoy year-round comfort with a system designed for maximum energy savings.

## Ductless (Mini-Split) Heat Pumps

Perfect for homes without ductwork, ductless mini-split heat pumps provide an energy-efficient alternative to baseboard or radiator heating. They’re also an excellent replacement for window AC units, giving you targeted cooling and heating wherever you need it.

## Call QuickFast Service for Mini Splits Heat Pump Installation Today!

## We'll get your Mini Splits Heat Pump running smoothly again

Flexible Financing Options for Any Budget

Get Same Day or Next Day Installation

Our Energy Efficient Mini Splits Heat Pump Will Help You Save on Your Bills

New Installs Come with a 10-Year Parts and Labour Guarantee

[GET QUOTE](https://www.quickfast.ca/contact-us)

## Why Choose a Mini-Split Heat Pump?

![Modern Living Room](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/83c5b99cb1344ae1b625d133cdb2905c.jpg/v1/fill/w_391,h_391,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Modern%20Living%20Room.jpg)

![Air Conditioner Unit](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/9483cd14722d4f50a3e6adcd62a2e972.jpg/v1/fill/w_391,h_391,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Air%20Conditioner%20Unit.jpg)

01

No Ductwork Required\
Perfect for homes without existing ducts, renovations, or home additions.

02

Customizable Zone Control\
Allows precise heating and cooling for individual rooms or areas.

03

Energy and Cost Savings\
Highly efficient system that lowers heating and cooling expenses over time.

04

Potential Rebates\
May qualify for government programs, helping make installation more affordable.
